overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing nighttime exploration of Night City. The clip begins with an elevated panoramic view of a neon-lit urban plaza with construction barriers, then transitions to street-level where the camera follows a character walking along sidewalks past holographic billboards and under highway overpasses. The environment features dystopian futuristic architecture with dense neon signage and wet reflective streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated plaza overlooking construction site and commercial district

events.description: camera pans right to reveal the central plaza area and surrounding neon billboards

agents.ego_description: stationary observation from an elevated walkway, panning across the urban plaza to survey the neon-lit surroundings

entered.detail: red and white striped barriers surrounding a central plaza construction area
massive cylindrical concrete support pillar in the plaza center
tall commercial buildings covered with illuminated holographic advertisements and neon signage
raised pedestrian platform with metal railings overlooking the plaza below

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an elevated view of a neon-lit urban plaza at night. Red and white construction barriers encircle a central area dominated by a massive concrete column. The camera pans right across the scene, revealing surrounding glass towers covered in bright holographic billboards. Sparse traffic moves on the road visible in the distance below.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk alongside multi-lane road with orange safety railings

events.description: transitions from elevated plaza view down to street level and begins following a pedestrian
camera begins moving forward at walking speed following a character along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian along the wet sidewalk next to a busy multi-lane road, passing illuminated billboards and orange safety barriers

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of the camera along the sidewalk, maintaining a steady pace

entered.detail: bright orange metal barriers separating the sidewalk from the multi-lane road
large illuminated advertisement displaying 'ALL FOODS' with a character image
wet asphalt road with multiple lanes and moving vehicle traffic
tall industrial street lights illuminating the sidewalk with harsh white light

segments.scene_description: The camera descends to street level and begins following a pedestrian along a wet concrete sidewalk. Orange safety railings line the right side separating the walkway from a busy multi-lane road. Large holographic billboards including a prominent 'All Foods' advertisement illuminate the scene. The character walks steadily forward as vehicles pass by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk under elevated highway with graffiti-covered retaining walls

events.description: enters covered area beneath a large highway overpass, becoming more enclosed
lighting shifts from bright neon to darker artificial street lighting as camera moves under the overpass

agents.ego_description: continuing to follow the pedestrian through a narrow corridor with high concrete walls covered in graffiti, passing under the highway overpass

notable_agents.action: walking ahead through the covered section, gradually moving further away from the camera

entered.detail: high concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art running alongside the sidewalk
massive elevated highway structure overhead blocking the sky and creating a tunnel-like effect

segments.scene_description: The walkway becomes enclosed as the camera enters a covered section beneath a massive highway overpass. A high concrete retaining wall covered in graffiti runs along the left side while orange railings continue on the right. The lighting becomes darker and more artificial, with street lamps providing the primary illumination. The pedestrian ahead continues walking deeper into the urban corridor as the open plaza and billboards fade from view behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from an elevated panoramic view of a neon-lit plaza into the claustrophobic depths of a concrete urban corridor. It begins high above a central concrete column and red construction barriers, panning right to reveal towering glass skyscrapers draped in bright holographic billboards. As the camera descends to street level, the perspective shifts to follow a pedestrian along a wet concrete sidewalk lined with orange safety railings and illuminated by a prominent All Foods advertisement. The scene then transitions into a covered section beneath a massive highway overpass, where the open sky and neon lights fade away. Finally, the environment closes in around a graffiti-covered retaining wall and artificial street lamps as the camera follows the figure deeper into the dark, industrial underpass.
